name: Kurant Cheesecake - Absolut
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whole Blanched Almonds, Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Wrap two 15x12-inch pieces of heavy-duty foil around the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a medium bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, almonds, sugar, and melted butter. Press mixture evenly onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pan. Refrigerate while preparing filling.
3. In a heavy-duty electric mixer bowl, beat cream cheese on low speed for 30 to 45 seconds until creamy. Increase speed to medium and gradually add sugar, one tablespoon at a time. Beat until blended (about 1 minute more). Add eggs, one at a time, scraping bowl as necessary.
4. Reduce speed to low and beat in cream, Absolut Kurant Vodka, and vanilla extract until thoroughly mixed (about 1 minute). Scrape side of bowl and beat until smooth. Pour batter into chilled crust.
5. Place cheesecake in a roasting pan and place the pan in the oven. Pour hot water into the roasting pan so that it comes halfway up the side of the springform pan. Bake for 65 to 75 minutes or until firm. Remove springform pan from roasting pan and place on a wire rack to cool for one hour. Refrigerate cheesecake for at least 3 hours before preparing topping.
6. In a microwaveable glass measuring cup, heat strawberry jelly in the microwave on high for 1 minute, stirring once until melted. Stir in Absolut Kurant Vodka.
7. Remove cheesecake from refrigerator and carefully remove side of springform pan. Arrange strawberries over top of cake, covering completely. Using a pastry brush, generously coat strawberries with strawberry/Kurant glaze. Sprinkle toasted almonds on top if desired.
